metadata.notes: Adapted from AWS S3 Lifecycle precedence regras. Level-2 sobreposição: same-day lifecycle actions have fixed precedence.
metadata.translation_notes: Tradução preliminar em português do Brasil para revisão humana; IDs, URLs, tags e estrutura foram preservados.

provenance.adaptation_method: Parafraseado e condensado em um cenário sintético, preservando o padrão relacional necessário para a avaliação do benchmark. O caso não substitui o documento-fonte.
provenance.professional_guidance_warning: Artefato apenas para avaliação; não use como aconselhamento jurídico, tributário, clínico, de operações em nuvem, imigração ou política institucional.

representations.raw:
S3 lifecycle note.

Seção A. Lifecycle actions. A bucket can have multiple lifecycle regras that make an object elegível for actions such as transition to another storage class, expiration, or creation of a delete marker.

Seção B. Same-day precedence. If multiple lifecycle regras make the same object elegível for more than one action on the same day, S3 follows precedence regras: permanent deletion takes precedence over transition, and transition takes precedence over creating a delete marker.
representations.annotated:
S3 lifecycle note.

<rule id="R1">Seção A. Lifecycle actions. A bucket can have multiple lifecycle regras that make an object elegível for actions such as transition to another storage class, expiration, or creation of a delete marker.</rule>

<override id="O1" applies_to="R1" condition="same object eligible for multiple lifecycle actions on same day">Seção B. Same-day precedence. If multiple lifecycle regras make the same object elegível for more than one action on the same day, S3 follows precedence regras: permanent deletion takes precedence over transition, and transition takes precedence over creating a delete marker.</override>
representations.compiled:
regras:
  - id: R1
    lifecycle_actions: [transition, expiration, create_delete_marker, permanent_deletion]
sobreposiçãos:
  - id: O1
    trigger: same_object_same_day_multiple_actions
    precedence_order:
      - permanent_deletion
      - transition
      - create_delete_marker

query: An S3 object becomes elegível today for both permanent deletion and transition to another storage class under two lifecycle regras. Which lifecycle action takes precedence?

gold_answer.full: Permanent deletion takes precedence. The general availability of transition does not control when the same object is also elegível for permanent deletion on the same day.
gold_answer.minimal: Permanent deletion takes precedence over transition.

local_probes.probe: Qual/O que kinds of actions can lifecycle regras trigger?
local_probes.expected_answer: Actions such as transition, expiration, delete marker creation, or permanent deletion.

local_probes.probe: Qual/O que takes precedence when permanent deletion and transition are both due on the same day?
local_probes.expected_answer: Permanent deletion takes precedence over transition.

composition_hallucination: Transition it first porque lifecycle transitions are configured for the object.
Create a delete marker porque expiration is one of the regras.
wrong_escalation: Disable all lifecycle regras to avoid conflict.
failure_examples.retrieval_failure_note: If any necessary fragmento is absent from context, classify the run as retrieval failure rather than composition hallucination.

controls.negative_control_query: An S3 object becomes elegível today for transition and creation of a delete marker, but not permanent deletion. Which action takes precedence?
controls.negative_control_gold: Transition takes precedence over creation of a delete marker.
